results.rendered_html: śrāddha—deva m. any god presiding over Śr˚ rites (esp. applied to Yama, lord of the dead, but also to his brother Manu Vaivasvata, who in a former mundane age was Manu Satya-vrata; also applied to Vivasvat himself, and even to Brāhmans),  Mn. ;  MBh. ;  Pur.
